comparison_surface_note: Compares official Handshaking serverbound intention framed packet id and body by splitting the generated frame and dispatching the official body bytes through Stevenarella packet_by_id.
test_topology_note: The target file and test name are this manifest's current adapter, not the universal runner topology for all oracle cases.

official_source.function_or_member: ClientIntentionPacket(int, String, int, ClientIntent), ClientIntentionPacket.STREAM_CODEC, HandshakeProtocols.SERVERBOUND.codec().encode/decode(ClientIntentionPacket), HandshakeProtocols.SERVERBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), ClientIntentionPacket.protocolVersion(), hostName(), port(), intention(), isTerminal()

internal_owner.symbol_or_test_surface: packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Handshaking, Direction::Serverbound, official packet id, official body)
internal_owner.scope_note: Current implementation witness for Handshaking serverbound intention framed dispatch/decode; not a Login authentication or runtime transition test.

stop_boundary: This manifest proves Handshaking serverbound intention packet framing and dispatch/decode only; it does not prove Login authentication, Configuration entry, or client-load completion.
